title: Persona extraction schema — TEMPLATE
description: Copy to framework/parsers/schemas/{persona}/v1.json and edit. Each property's `description` is injected into the LLM parser prompt — write them carefully. Keep field count modest (<=15) for extraction quality. Spec ref: ADR-004, persona-knowledge-builder.md.

REPLACE_required_field_1.description: What the LLM should extract for this field. Be precise — vague descriptions degrade extraction quality.

REPLACE_required_field_2.description: Structured field example. Required nested keys go in the `required` array below.

REPLACE_optional_field.description: Optional list field. Empty list is valid.

REPLACE_enum_field.description: Use enum for controlled vocabularies — improves extraction consistency.
